title: Chapter 42: The Going Merry Sets Sail
main_description: The Straw Hats begin settling into their new ship after Syrup Village. Usopp’s role becomes clearer, the crew raises its flag, and Johnny and Yosaku point the story toward the need for a cook.
key_events: The crew creates and raises its pirate flag.
Usopp begins fitting into the crew as sniper.
Johnny and Yosaku enter the story and lead the crew toward Baratie.
